name: index-server
description: Index Server providing governed, classified, and auditable instruction indexes with analytics and optional admin dashboard.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Index Server
walkthroughs.description: Set up your governed instruction index for AI agents.

steps.title: Choose a Profile & Configure
steps.description:
Pick a server profile and target format (VS Code mcp.json or Copilot CLI mcp-config.json) to generate your MCP client configuration.

[Configure MCP Client](command:index.configure)
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22index.profile%22)

steps.title: Set Up TLS Certificates
steps.description:
Generate a self-signed certificate and enable HTTPS for the dashboard. Required for the Enhanced and Experimental profiles.

[Re-generate Config](command:index.configure)
[Open Dashboard](command:index.openDashboard)
[Show Status](command:index.showStatus)

steps.title: Set Up Semantic Search
steps.description:
Download the embedding model and enable meaning-based instruction search. Included in Enhanced and Experimental profiles.

[Re-generate Config](command:index.configure)
[Show Status](command:index.showStatus)

steps.title: Set Up SQLite Storage
steps.description:
Switch from JSON to SQLite for FTS5 full-text search and WAL-mode concurrency. Experimental profile only.

[Re-generate Config](command:index.configure)
[Show Status](command:index.showStatus)
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22index%22)

steps.title: Search Instructions
steps.description:
Use the index search tools in Copilot Chat agent mode.

Try asking: *search index-server for post installation configuration*

[Show Status](command:index.showStatus)
[Open Dashboard](command:index.openDashboard)

steps.title: Open the Dashboard
steps.description:
Enable the admin dashboard for real-time monitoring.

[Open Dashboard](command:index.openDashboard)
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22index.dashboard%22)

steps.title: Verify Your Setup
steps.description:
Confirm the server is running and connected. Troubleshoot common issues.

[Show Status](command:index.showStatus)
[Configure MCP Client](command:index.configure)
[Open Dashboard](command:index.openDashboard)

enumDescriptions: HTTP standalone — minimal config, local JSON storage
Semantic search + HTTPS — enables TLS, semantic embeddings, file logging, mutation, metrics
SQLite + debug — all enhanced features plus SQLite storage backend and debug logging
index.profile.description: Server profile that controls default features and storage.

index.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the Index Server dist/server/index-server.js. Leave empty to use npx @jagilber-org/index-server.

index.instructionsDir.description: Absolute path to the instructions directory. Leave empty for built-in defaults.

index.dashboard.enabled.description: Enable the admin dashboard HTTP server.

index.dashboard.port.description: Port for the admin dashboard HTTP server.

index.logLevel.description: Log level for the MCP server.

index.mutation.enabled.description: Enable mutation operations (add, import, remove, etc.).
